name: Коллегия Луны
description: Bards of the College of the Moon are itinerant musicians who weave the bytes of moonlight into their performances.
note: This subclass is from a different game edition. For a given subclass feature, you may gain that feature at a different level from the one specified in the subclass feature.

features.name: Moon's Inspiration
features.description: When you expend a use of Bardic Inspiration, you can choose the target to be bathed in moonlight for 10 minutes. While bathed in moonlight, the target sheds bright light in a 5-foot radius and dim light for an additional 5 feet. In addition, the target has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against being {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or {@condition Frightened|XPHB}.

features.name: Primal Lore
features.description: You gain proficiency in the {@skill Nature} and {@skill Survival} skills if you don't already have them. Additionally, you learn the {@spell Faerie Fire|XPHB} and {@spell Moonbeam|XPHB} spells. They count as Bard spells for you and don't count against the number of Bard spells you know.

features.name: Blessing of Moonlight
features.description:
When you or a creature you can see within 60 feet of you is hit by an attack, you can use your {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to shroud the target in moonlight, granting it {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to the triggering damage. In addition, the attacker must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against your spell save DC or have the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your {@variantrule Proficiency Bonus|XPHB}, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

features.name: Eventide's Splendor
features.description:
You can channel the full brilliance of the moon. As an action, you can create a 30-foot-radius sphere of moonlight centered on a point you can see within 120 feet. The sphere lasts for 1 minute or until you lose {@status Concentration|XPHB} (as if concentrating on a spell). When a creature enters the sphere for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, you choose one of the following effects:

• The creature regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to a roll of your Bardic Inspiration die + your Charisma modifier.
• The creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against your spell save DC or take radiant damage equal to two rolls of your Bardic Inspiration die and have the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

Once you use this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
